query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A child with long brown hair wearing a red long-sleeve shirt and blue jeans swings on a green rope swing in a wooded area. The child is leaning backward with arms gripping the ropes, legs extended forward, and white sneakers visible. Bare trees and brown undergrowth form the background, with a strip of ground visible at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A child with long brown hair wearing a red long-sleeve shirt and blue jeans swings on a green rope swing, captured with horizontal motion blur that streaks the background trees and ground into soft parallel lines while partially blurring the subject. The child leans backward with arms gripping the ropes, legs extended, and white sneakers slightly smeared from movement. The casual framing and dynamic blur create an unplanned, snapshot-like energy in the wooded setting with bare trees and brown undergrowth.
